---
title: "Lecture 1: Introduction to Bobbology"
date: "2026-05-09"
order: 1
description: "Slide-deck companion to Lesson 1 — a field guide to Bobbles, Ekos, Vessels, and Daemons, and the role each plays at the decision gate."
categories: [presentation, bobble, bobbology]
path: /assets/introduction-to-bobbology.pdf
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/assets/introduction-to-bobbology.pdf">the slide deck (PDF)</a>… or switch to the <a href="/introduction-to-bobbology.html">long-form lecture</a>.</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/assets/introduction-to-bobbology.pdf");</script>
```
